themes.reasoning_notes: Neck Breaker is an attack anthem, boosting all attacking creatures with +1/+0 and trample, rewarding wide combat boards.
Werewolf type and transform pattern give some tribal relevance, but the payoff text is not tribe-locked.
Neck Breaker is a boardwide attack anthem, giving all attacking creatures +1/+0 and trample, which strongly rewards going wide.
It grants trample to the whole attacking team, making it a real but secondary trample enabler rather than a dedicated trample card.
